allow: Bash(sqlcmd -S 192.168.10.135 -d MT -U sa -P 'CSF@01024304' -C -h-1 -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT Email, COUNT\(*\) AS Cnt FROM dbo.MT_Users WHERE Email IS NOT NULL AND Email <> '' GROUP BY Email HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S 192.168.10.135 -d MT -U sa -P 'CSF@01024304' -C -h-1 -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT Id, Username, DisplayName, Email, RoleId FROM dbo.MT_Users WHERE Email IN \(SELECT Email FROM dbo.MT_Users WHERE Email IS NOT NULL AND Email <> '' GROUP BY Email HAVING COUNT\(*\) > 1\) ORDER BY Email, Id;")

Bash(sqlcmd -S 192.168.10.135 -d MT -U sa -P 'CSF@01024304' -C -h-1 -W -s"|" -Q "SET NOCOUNT ON; SELECT 'MT_PasswordResetTokens' AS T, COUNT\(*\) FROM dbo.MT_PasswordResetTokens WHERE UserId = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'MT_LoginLogs', COUNT\(*\) FROM dbo.MT_LoginLogs WHERE UserId = 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'MT_Teachers', COUNT\(*\) FROM dbo.MT_Teachers WHERE UserId = 3;")
